# Shabbat Shalom. A moment to pause, to reflect, to rise again.*Created: Friday, February 28, 2025 at 10:25:12?PM*<div><b>Shabbat Shalom. A moment to pause, to reflect, to rise again.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b><i>ŇFall seven times, rise eight.Ó</i></b><b><br></b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>A man walked by, paused, and said, </b><b><i>ŇThis is a calling. No matter how hard it gets, you rise.Ó</i></b><b><br></b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>A woman stopped, took a picture. </b><b><i>ŇNot of you,Ó</i></b><b> she said, </b><b><i>Ňbut of this.Ó</i></b><b><br></b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>I stood there, watching them watching it. A simple scroll on a wall. But it wasnŐt just that. It was a reminder.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>Of the rhythm we all live in.</b></div>
<div><b>Of falling. Of getting up. Of trying again.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>The dwindling number of days.</b></div>
<div><b>The stories we carry.</b></div>
<div><b>The moments shaping us when we arenŐt even looking.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>So I took a photo, too.</b></div>
<div><b>Not just of it.</b></div>
<div><b><i>But of what it meant.</i></b><b><br></b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>Shabbat Shalom. A time to reset, to let go, to rise once more.</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>
<div><b>#ShabbatShalom</b></div>
<div><b>#RiseAgain</b></div>
<div><b>#MindfulMoments</b></div>
<div><b>#FallSevenRiseEight</b></div>
<div><b>#LifeReflections</b></div>
<div><b>#TheArtOfSeeing</b></div>
<div><b>#SacredPauses</b></div>
<div><b>#FindingMeaning</b></div>
<div><b>#KeepGoing</b></div>
<div><b>#MomentsThatMatter</b></div>
<div><b>#TimelessWisdom</b><br></div>
